page_content: General Education Requirements Architecture Requirements Fundamental Studies (FS) Year 1 Benchmark Requirements 15 Credits / 5 Courses Course Credits Grade RDEV250/ARCH271 Academic Writing (FSAW) ENGL101 HISP200 Professional Writing (FSPW) Oral Communication (FSOC) Year 2 – Benchmark Requirements Math (FSMA) RDEV270 or BMGT210 Analytic Reasoning (FSAR) RDEV350 Distributive Studies (DS) 25 Credits / 8 Courses Course Credits Grade Natural Science Lab (DSNL) Natural Sciences (DSNS) Major Requirements History/Social Sciences (DSHS) Students must earn a minimum of a C- in all major courses listed below History/Social Sciences (DSHS) Cumulative average of all major requirements must be at least a 2.0 Humanities (DSHU) HISP200 Requirements Credits Grade Humanities (DSHU) RDEV250/ARCH271 3 Scholarship in Practice (DSSP) RDEV250 RDEV350 3 Scholarship in Practice (DSSP) RDEV450 3 *non-major Big Questions (SCIS) RDEV410 3 6 Credits / 2 Courses Course Credits Grade RDEV415 3 Big Questions (SCIS) HISP200 RDEV47X 3 Big Questions (SCIS) RDEV270 or BMIN210 3 Diversity (DV) HISP200 3 6 Credits / 2 Courses Course Credits Grade URSP250 or URSP372 3 Understanding Plural Soc (DVUP) HISP200 ARCH270 or RDEV440 or RDEV445 3 Understanding Plural Soc (DVUP) REBE Major Elective 3 or Cultural Competency (DVCC) Experiential Learning – Optional REBE Major Elective 3 0-3 credits / 0-1 courses Course Credits Grade REBE Major Elective 3 University Requirements for Graduation: □ Must earn a minimum of 120 credits to complete a degree. □ At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD □ 15 of the ﬁnal 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level □ 12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD ARCH Requirements for Graduation □ At least 45 upper level credits
